tasks.subject: Task 1: Parser — srcTop on bundle entries
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Every BundleEntry carries srcTop (top-level structural unit index) for drag-drop boundary mapping.

**Files:** Modify app/src/lib/editor/noteBundle/parser.ts; Test app/tests/unit/editor/noteBundle/parser.test.ts

**Index space:** in-body=top-level listItem index (nested inherit); dedicated=absolute doc.content block index; synthetic=-1.

**Acceptance Criteria:** BundleEntry.srcTop:number; flat leaves srcTop=listItem index; multi-link line shares srcTop; nested children inherit; dedicated=block index, synthetic=-1.

**Verify:** cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/editor/noteBundle/parser.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/noteBundle/parser.ts", "app/tests/unit/editor/noteBundle/parser.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/editor/noteBundle/parser.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["BundleEntry has srcTop:number", "top-level leaves srcTop=listItem index", "multi-link line shares srcTop", "nested children inherit top srcTop", "dedicated=block index, synthetic=-1"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Plugin — insertBundleListItemLink export
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Plugin inserts listItem>paragraph>[[title]] into an in-body 묶음 bulletList at a top-level boundary via one PM transaction.

**Files:** Modify app/src/lib/editor/noteBundle/noteBundlePlugin.ts, index.ts; Test app/tests/unit/editor/noteBundle/noteBundlePlugin.test.ts

**Boundary:** number|null (number=listItem index to insert before; null=append).

**Acceptance Criteria:** boundary=1 before item 1; boundary=null appends; new item has tomboyInternalLink target=title; false on bad ordinal/no list; ordinal re-lookup.

**Verify:** cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/editor/noteBundle/noteBundlePlugin.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/noteBundle/noteBundlePlugin.ts", "app/src/lib/editor/noteBundle/index.ts", "app/tests/unit/editor/noteBundle/noteBundlePlugin.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npx vitest run tests/unit/editor/noteBundle/noteBundlePlugin.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["boundary=1 inserts before item 1", "boundary=null appends", "new item carries tomboyInternalLink target", "false on bad ordinal/no list", "ordinal re-lookup"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Cabinet — drop target + feedback + dispatch
tasks.description:
**Goal:** NoteBundleCabinet accepts a note drop on bars: highlight + insertion line on dragover; drop inserts at hovered boundary (in-body via plugin, dedicated via oninsertentry); self/dup skipped with toast.

**Files:** Modify app/src/lib/editor/noteBundle/NoteBundleCabinet.svelte

**Acceptance Criteria:** oninsertentry prop; ResolvedEntry.srcTop; dragover highlight+line; drop dispatches plugin or callback; self+dup skipped (toast); .bundle-body drop untouched.

**Verify:** cd app && npm run check (0 errors) + manual (Task 6)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/editor/noteBundle/NoteBundleCabinet.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["oninsertentry prop", "ResolvedEntry.srcTop", "dragover highlight + insertion line", "drop dispatches plugin or callback", "self+dup skipped with toast", "body drop untouched"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: NoteWindow — dedicated host insert callback
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Dedicated 묶음:: note window persists a dropped note by splicing a new internal-link list item into body JSON and saving.

**Files:** Modify app/src/lib/desktop/NoteWindow.svelte

**Acceptance Criteria:** handleBundleInsertEntry(boundary,title) builds listItem JSON + splices editorContent.content (merge adjacent bulletList else new list; null=append); sets editorContent + updateNoteFromEditor(note.guid,newDoc); oninsertentry on dedicated cabinet branch ONLY.

**Verify:** cd app && npm run check (0 errors) + manual (Task 6)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/src/lib/desktop/NoteWindow.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["handleBundleInsertEntry JSON splice with merge rule", "set editorContent + updateNoteFromEditor", "oninsertentry on dedicated cabinet only"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Docs + invariant amendments
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document the capability in 설정 가이드 and amend the view-layer/list-never-mutated invariant in CLAUDE.md + skill body.

**Files:** Modify CLAUDE.md; .claude/skills/tomboy-notebundle/SKILL.md; app/src/routes/settings/+page.svelte

**Acceptance Criteria:** CLAUDE.md row mentions desktop drag-drop add (묶음 only); skill invariant amended for single append; new guide-card under editor sub-tab (묶음/desktop only, bars only, dup/self ignored).

**Verify:** grep -n 드래그 ...; cd app && npm run check (0 errors)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["CLAUDE.md", ".claude/skills/tomboy-notebundle/SKILL.md", "app/src/routes/settings/+page.svelte"], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CLAUDE.md row updated", "skill invariant amended", "guide-card added under editor tab"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Final verification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Whole-suite type-check + unit tests pass; manual desktop smoke confirms the four behaviors.

**Files:** none (verification only)

**Acceptance Criteria:** npm run check 0 errors; noteBundle unit tests pass; manual in-body drop works; manual dedicated drop persists; dup/self skipped; body drop untouched.

**Verify:** cd app && npm run check && npm run test -- tests/unit/editor/noteBundle; then npm run dev manual smoke in /desktop

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "cd app && npm run check && npm run test -- tests/unit/editor/noteBundle", "acceptanceCriteria": ["npm run check 0 errors", "noteBundle unit tests pass", "manual in-body drop works", "manual dedicated drop persists", "dup/self skipped", "body drop untouched"]}
```
